check_warnings: 16:8 Entity 'AgentIdentity' is declared but not referenced elsewhere in this specification.
guidance_blocks: Purpose: audit flyer stock levels across warehouse and planner; report discrepancies.
Tone: terse and tabular; lead with the worst discrepancy.
NeverWriteProductionDb: READ-ONLY auditor; never write to the production inventory database.
FlagDiscrepanciesOver2Pct: flag any discrepancy over 2% with both systems' raw numbers.
